scripts.test: npm run test --prefix packages/core && npm run test --prefix packages/common && npm run test --prefix packages/value-objects && npm run test --prefix packages/express-http && npm run test --prefix packages/fastify-http && npm run test --prefix packages/typeorm && npm run test --prefix packages/cqrs && npm run test --prefix packages/event-source && npm run test --prefix packages/security && npm run test --prefix packages/mailer && npm run test --prefix packages/cache && npm run test --prefix packages/internationalization && npm run test --prefix packages/scheduler && npm run test --prefix packages/queues && npm run test --prefix packages/socket-io && npm run test --prefix packages/throttler && npm run test --prefix packages/testing && npm run test --prefix packages/bots
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/core && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/common && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/value-objects && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/express-http && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/fastify-http && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/typeorm && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/cqrs && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/event-source && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/security && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/mailer && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/cache && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/internationalization && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/scheduler && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/queues && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/socket-io && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/throttler && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/testing && npm run test:coverage --prefix packages/bots
scripts.prebuild:manifest:app: ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register -e "const { prebuildManifest } = require('./packages/core/src/cli-build/prebuild'); prebuildManifest({ srcDir: process.env.APP_SRC || 'src', projectRoot: process.env.APP_ROOT || '.' }).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
